title: TR Sakura Replace Cherry
description: This mod replaces the vanilla Cherry textures with the ones from TenSura: Reincarnated due to them being more accurate.
body:
Replaces the vanilla Cherry Wood type textures with the Sakura Wood type from [TenSura: Reincarnated](https://modrinth.com/mod/tensura-reincarnated) due to them looking more accurate to the IRL wood

_We also did add the Cherry Blossom wood type before Mojang did_
